name: xlb
description: 喜乐帮 / XLB — 三端 App Monorepo

scripts.test:e2e:phase22: vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project db-serial tests/integration/phase22CrossPhaseE2E.test.ts && playwright test tests/e2e/phase21-three-app-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:outbox:phase23b: vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project unit-contract tests/unit/outboxDeliveryPolicy.test.ts && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project db-serial tests/integration/outboxClaimConcurrency.test.ts tests/integration/dispatchRunOnce.test.ts tests/integration/ledgerRunOnce.test.ts
scripts.test:frontend:phase23c: vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project unit-contract tests/unit/appErrorBoundary.test.tsx tests/unit/workerFeatureReducers.test.ts tests/unit/workerApp.test.tsx && vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project db-serial tests/security/phase23cFrontendBoundaryGates.test.ts
scripts.test:worker:phase23d: vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project unit-contract tests/unit/workerFeatureReducers.test.ts tests/unit/workerApp.test.tsx tests/unit/phase23dWorkerJourneyComponents.test.tsx
scripts.test:e2e:phase23d: vitest run --workspace vitest.workspace.ts --project db-serial tests/integration/phase23dWorkerLifecycleE2E.test.ts tests/integration/phase22CrossPhaseE2E.test.ts && playwright test tests/e2e/phase21-three-app-smoke.spec.ts
